<!--
Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused on one logical change.
See CONTRIBUTING.md. For security issues, use SECURITY.md instead of a PR.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (agent, connector, route, UI)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore / refactor / tooling

## How I verified

<!-- Commands run, manual steps, or screenshots/clips for UI changes. -->

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or real customer data in the diff (`.env*` stays gitignored)
- [ ] Screenshots/fixtures use fictional companies
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or env vars changed
